caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a navy blue baseball cap with a logo, and over-ear headphones speaks into a professional microphone in a studio setting. He wears a gold chain and a watch on his left wrist. In the background, a white banner features the text "EMPIRE HUSTLE" and gold stars, while a screen displays the word "BOSS" and "101". An on-screen logo in the lower left reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST," and a similar logo appears on the right stating "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man gesticulates with both hands, starting with his arms extended outward to emphasize a point. As the clip progresses, he brings his hands closer to his chest and eventually rests his left hand near the microphone, continuing to speak with an expressive facial expression.
